name: Mandarin Chicken #1
recipeIngredient: 2 Whole chicken breasts, boned and skinned
1/4 cup Frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed
2 packages Instant chicken broth and seasoning mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the chicken in butter. Remove the chicken and set aside.
2. In the same skillet, cook mushrooms over high heat until the liquid evaporates, about 1-2 minutes.
3. Remove the skillet from the heat. Sprinkle the mushrooms with flour and stir-fry quickly to combine.
4. Gradually stir in water. Add orange juice and dry seasoning mix.
5. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly.
6. Reduce heat. Add the chicken and simmer about 3 minutes.
7. Add orange sections and sprinkle with green onions. Serve over a bed of rice.
